overview: Everblack Music is a professional landing page and web portal for a guitar teaching business in Aachen. Features dedicated pages for lessons, studio services, media, and an online shop. Managed entirely via a powerful admin panel with full CRUD control over all content, texts, images, colors, and media.
features: Full CRUD admin panel for all site content
Dedicated pages for guitar lessons, studio services, media, and shop
Album upload with multi-track support and cover artwork
Contextual image uploads per content item
Stripe-integrated shop for digital products and merch
YouTube embeds and Spotify link cards on Media page
Dark turquoise-themed design with gradient support
Legal pages (Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB) editable via admin
